data.title: The Central Bank of Pakistan has allowed banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers.
data.description: The Central Bank of Pakistan has officially allowed banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers, lifting its 2018 ban. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gold and silver prices trended upwards, with Gate.com's metals contracts showing the highest trading activity in the industry.
data.description: The metals market continued its upward trend. International silver reached a 24-hour high of $81.07, currently trading at $80.20, a 24-hour increase of approximately 5.24%; international gold reached a 24-hour high of $4,847.1, currently trading at $4,806.1, a 24-hour increase of approximately 1.35%. Against the backdrop of continued strength in metal prices, market trading sentiment has clearly heated up. According to CoinGlass data, metal contract trading on the Gate platform has been very active. Silver contract trading volume reached approximately $168 million in the past 24 hours, ranking among the top in the industry; gold current open interest is approximately $35.8041 million, also at a leading level. Driven by rising prices, bullish sentiment is dominant, further boosting market activity. Gate pioneered a metal contract trading section, providing 24/7 uninterrupted trading, offering users greater strategic flexibility and asset management efficiency in volatile market conditions. Gate contracts cover a wide range of traditional financial assets, including stocks, metals, forex, indices, and commodities, supporting trading in core assets such as gold, silver, and popular global stocks. Gate continues to build a more efficient and professional one-stop trading platform for multi-asset trading for users worldwide.

data.title: U.S. Senate Agenda Lacks Digital Asset Legislation Discussion
data.description:
The U.S. Senate's agenda for the upcoming week includes only a nomination hearing, with no scheduled discussions on digital assets or the CLARITY Act. According to BlockBeats, this information was revealed on the Senate Banking Committee's official website.

Additionally, Politico reports that Senator Thom Tillis is set to release the final draft of a bill this week, which is a crucial step before the committee's markup meeting. The bill must align with the Senate Agriculture Committee and pass a full Senate vote with a 60-vote threshold, requiring Democratic support, before coordination with the House.

Analysts suggest that if a markup meeting is not scheduled between April 20 and 25, the bill could be jeopardized by midterm election politics, potentially ending bipartisan cooperation.

data.title: Investors Await Outcome of Potential US-Iran Talks
data.description: Financial markets are experiencing a rare calm as investors anticipate developments from a potential second round of discussions between the United States and Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the cautious stance of market participants amid geopolitical uncertainties. The anticipation stems from the possibility of diplomatic engagements that could influence global economic conditions. Investors are closely monitoring the situation, aware that any significant progress or setbacks in these talks could have substantial implications for financial markets worldwide.

data.title: Japan Extends Oil Reserve Measures Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: On April 15, Japan announced the extension of measures to release private oil reserves by one month due to ongoing tensions in the Middle East. According to BlockBeats, the Japanese government made this decision to ensure stability in oil supply. As of April 12, Japan's private oil reserves were sufficient for approximately 78 days, and when combined with national reserves, the total reserve capacity amounts to 222 days.

data.title: 国投白银LOF Announces Temporary Trading Suspension
data.description: 国投白银LOF has announced a temporary suspension of trading starting from the market opening on April 16, 2026, until 10:30 on the same day. According to Jin10, redemption services will continue as usual during the suspension period. Trading will resume at 10:30 on April 16, 2026.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | India's March Gold Imports Estimated at $2.98 Billion
data.description: India's gold imports for March were estimated at $2.98 billion, according to calculations by Reuters. This figure reflects the country's ongoing demand for the precious metal, which plays a significant role in its economy and cultural practices. According to Jin10, the import data highlights the importance of gold in India's trade balance and its impact on the global gold market. The estimation provides insight into the trends and economic factors influencing India's gold import activities.

data.title: US President Trump is attempting to pressure Iran, and the US is sending thousands more troops to the Middle East.
data.description: According to the Washington Post: US President Trump is trying to pressure Iran, and the US is sending thousands more troops to the Middle East.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's MSBT ETF Acquires $83.6 Million in Bitcoin Since Launch
data.description: Morgan Stanley's MSBT ETF has made significant investments in Bitcoin since its inception this week. According to Odaily, the ETF has purchased $83.6 million worth of Bitcoin, with its on-chain address currently holding approximately $64.4 million in Bitcoin.

data.title: Bittensor Faces Significant Token Value Decline
data.description: Bittensor, known as a leading decentralized AI platform, recently experienced a dramatic drop in its token value. According to PANews, the value of Bittensor's token, $TAO, plummeted between 15% and 25% in a single day. This sudden decline has significantly impacted the assets of many investors who had faith in the platform.

data.title: STRC's two-day fundraising campaign can purchase 26,334 BTC.
data.description: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin treasury company, Strategy (STRC), raised enough funds in two days to purchase 26,334 bitcoins, representing approximately 0.15% of the total bitcoin supply. Strategy currently holds a total of 807,231 bitcoins.

data.title: Morgan Stanley-related MSBT ETFs have purchased $83.6 million worth of BTC this week.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, the MSBT ETF, which is related to Morgan Stanley, has purchased $83.6 million worth of BTC since its inception this week, and its on-chain addresses currently hold approximately $64.4 million worth of BTC.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Considers Revising Tariff Deal with UK
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has indicated a potential shift in the tariff agreement established between the United States and the United Kingdom. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Trump's suggestion to possibly alter the terms of the existing deal. This development could impact trade relations between the two nations, as the original agreement was designed to facilitate smoother economic interactions. The implications of such a change remain uncertain, with potential effects on both countries' economies and international trade dynamics. Further details on the proposed revisions have yet to be disclosed, leaving stakeholders in anticipation of official announcements.

data.title: Strategy Raises Funds to Acquire Significant Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
Michael Saylor's Bitcoin treasury company, Strategy, has raised funds through its perpetual preferred stock, STRC, enabling the purchase of 26,334 bitcoins within two days. According to Odaily, this acquisition represents approximately 0.15% of the total bitcoin supply.

With this recent purchase, Strategy now controls a total of 807,231 bitcoins.

data.title: AI TRENDS | DGrid Launches DClaw for Simplified AI Deployment
data.description:
AI infrastructure service provider DGrid has officially launched its core product, DClaw, aimed at simplifying the deployment of personal AI agents. According to Foresight News, this initiative seeks to significantly lower the barriers to entry for the open agent economy, offering an out-of-the-box personal local AI assistant for individuals, developers, teams, and various communities.

DClaw represents a comprehensive product upgrade compared to the open-source framework OpenClaw. It features a true one-click deployment capability, reducing the technical configuration process from hours to minutes. The product natively integrates with DGrid's unified model access API, allowing immediate access to leading global models like GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, and Kimi K2.5 without additional API key configurations. Additionally, it is natively compatible with major office and communication platforms such as WeChat, WeCom, DingTalk, and Telegram, enabling seamless operation across different environments.

Furthermore, DClaw includes a user-sovereign persistent memory system and a hot-swappable modular skill plugin ecosystem, supporting multi-agent collaborative work to meet various automated execution needs. Each DClaw instance can function as an intelligent node within the DGrid network, facilitating a deep integration of personal utility and open ecosystem development.

DClaw is now officially available, allowing users to quickly set up their own personal AI agents and participate in the DGrid open agent economy ecosystem.

data.title: South Korea Dominates Global Crypto Trading with High Altcoin Activity
data.description:
South Korea accounts for 30% of the global cryptocurrency trading volume, with altcoins making up a significant 85% of this activity. According to BlockBeats, data from KaikoData reveals that Bitcoin and Ethereum represent only 9% and 6% of the market, respectively.

The average weekly trading volume on South Korean platforms reaches $2.622 billion, predominantly driven by altcoin transactions, indicating a strong speculative trend. In contrast, Japan's cryptocurrency trading volume remains stable at $2-3 billion monthly. Although Japan's volume is considerably lower than South Korea's, its Bitcoin market depth is three to five times greater, offering better liquidity.

data.title: The IRS has officially implemented new reporting standards for digital assets to curb tax evasion.
data.description: On April 15, the IRS officially entered a new phase of enforcement, with mandatory cost basis reporting requirements for digital asset brokers now fully effective for the 2026 tax year. Centralized exchanges, custodial wallet providers, and certain digital asset processors are required to issue Form 1099-DA to the IRS and taxpayers, documenting every sale and transaction of digital assets. The IRS stated that this move aims to close a long-standing "compliance gap" and align crypto reporting standards with traditional stocks and bonds. The new rules require brokers to track the "cost basis" of each asset from acquisition to disposal, and taxpayers must be able to verify the specific purchase price and date of each token sold. The Treasury Department has introduced a simplified electronic consent process, allowing brokers to terminate their partnerships with clients who refuse to participate in the new reporting framework. Although the Trump administration has ordered the repeal of the "DeFi broker" designation that considered front-end service providers like Uniswap as reporting entities, the IRS stated that it will track on-chain activity through advanced forensic audits, and investors using self-custodial wallets to "evade" reporting requirements face higher audit risks. (FinanceFeeds)

data.title: STOCKS | Sig Energy Surges Over 97% in Pre-Market Trading Ahead of Hong Kong Exchange Debut
data.description: Sig Energy (06656.HK) experienced a significant increase in pre-market trading today, with its stock price soaring over 97%. According to Jin10, the company's latest market valuation has surpassed HKD 150 billion. Sig Energy is set to officially list on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on April 16.

data.title: Binance Wealth Management: Subscribe to buy cryptocurrencies at a discount and earn up to 50% annualized return.
data.description: According to official news, Binance Wealth Management is increasing annualized rewards for all users who purchase cryptocurrency at a discount to provide better service. During the promotion period, users who subscribe to any discounted cryptocurrency purchase product can enjoy an annualized return of up to 50%. Promotion period: April 15, 2026, 16:30 to May 16, 2026, 07:59 (UTC+8). How to participate: During the promotion period, subscribing to any discounted cryptocurrency purchase will give you the opportunity to buy cryptocurrency at a price lower than the market price, or enjoy an annualized return of up to 50% depending on market trends.

data.title: Pakistan Lifts Ban on Banking Services for Virtual Asset Entities
data.description: Pakistan's central bank has lifted a ban imposed in 2018, allowing banks to open segregated, non-interest-bearing accounts in Pakistani Rupees for entities licensed by the Pakistan Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority. According to Foresight News, banks are required to conduct due diligence before providing these services.
